headline: Formula 1 Posts On X "The Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix will not take place in April. Due to the ongoing situation in the Middle East the Grands Prix, alongside F2, F3, and F1 Academy rounds, will not take place as scheduled. While alternatives were considered, no substitutions will be made in April"

headline: US Commerce Dept Reportedly Withdraws Planned Rule On AI Chip Exports

headline: Trump Says Putin May Be Helping Iran 'A Bit' As Report Claims Russia Shared US Target Intel
summary: Donald Trump said Vladimir Putin may be helping Iran "a bit" amid the escalating Middle East conflict, as reports claim Russia shared intelligence on U.S. military positions while Washington warns Moscow against assisting Tehran.
